project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: 外部隐私应用的bundleName和abilityName（路由参数）
project_privacy_data_flows.description: 用户在隐私中心点击某项应用隐私入口后，隐私中心通过UiExtensionComponent加载该应用注册的隐私界面。如该应用的类型为sys/commonUI，则直接在隐私中心内嵌显示。

flow_steps.code: @Component struct PrivacyProtectionListView { ... itemClickEvent((menuInfo: MenuInfo) => { autoMenuViewModel.processIntent(new AutoMenuClickIntent(menuInfo)); }) }
flow_steps.details: 用户点击隐私应用列表中的某个菜单项，触发跳转到目标应用隐私设置页。
根据菜单配置的dstAbilityMode决定跳转方式：UIAbility模式直接启动外部Ability，Extension模式则通过UiExtensionPage内嵌加载。

flow_steps.code: @State routerParma: Record<string, string> = router.getParams() as Record<string, string>; @State dstBundleName: string = this.routerParma['dstBundleName']; @State dstAbilityName: string = this.routerParma['dstAbilityName'];
flow_steps.details: 接收路由参数中的目标应用包名(bundleName)和能力名(abilityName)。

flow_steps.code: UIExtensionComponent({ bundleName: this.dstBundleName, abilityName: this.dstAbilityName, parameters: { 'ability.want.params.uiExtensionType': 'sys/commonUI' } })
flow_steps.details: 通过UIExtensionComponent加载外部应用的隐私界面组件。外部应用的UI在隐私中心内嵌显示，但运行在独立进程中。双向通信通过onRemoteReady/onResult/onReceive回调。
